name: hwp_fill_weekly_capstone_template
description: Fill the capstone weekly report HWP template (named 누름틀: report_date, goal_detail_1–4, goal_rate_1–4, member_g1, author_name, prog_detail_1–4, prog_rate_1–4, s3_task_1–3, s3_deliver_1–3, s4_problem/solution/pending, next_week, s6_evidence) from a UTF-8 weekly .txt with sections 1–6. Uses PutFieldText and saves a new .hwp.

template_path.title: Template Path
template_path.description: Absolute path to the .hwp template with matching field names.

weekly_txt_path.title: Weekly Txt Path
weekly_txt_path.description: UTF-8 weekly report text (1. 기본 정보 … 6. 참고 자료).
